mapper.select: SELECT id FROM members WHERE name=%s
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order),0)+1 as cnt FROM members
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (restaurant_id,restaurant_name,orderer_name,menu_id,menu_name,addons_json,sides_json,price,note,over_limit) VALUES (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s) RETURNING id
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cart_items WHERE session_key=%s AND status='pending' ORDER BY added_at
SELECT id, qty FROM cart_items WHERE session_key=%s AND menu_id=%s AND restaurant_id=%s AND addons_json=%s AND sides_json=%s AND note=%s AND status='pending'
mapper.update: UPDATE cart_items SET qty=%s, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=%s
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_items (session_key, orderer_name, restaurant_id, restaurant_name, menu_id, menu_name, menu_emoji, price, qty, addons_json, sides_json, note, status) VALUES (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,'pending') RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE cart_items SET status='removed' WHERE id=%s
UPDATE cart_items SET status='removed' WHERE session_key=%s AND status='pending'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cart_items WHERE session_key=%s AND status='pending'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (restaurant_id,restaurant_name,orderer_name, menu_id,menu_name,addons_json,sides_json,price,note,over_limit) VALUES (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,0) RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE cart_items SET status='ordered', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM deadline_unlock_requests WHERE member_id=%s AND DATE(requested_at)=CURRENT_DATE
SELECT * FROM deadline_unlock_requests ORDER BY requested_at DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM deadline_unlock_requests WHERE is_read=0
mapper.update: UPDATE deadline_unlock_requests SET is_read=1 WHERE is_read=0
